name: google-gmail
description: Read, search, and send emails from your Gmail account
long_description:
Full Gmail integration for Chitty Workspace. Read your inbox, search emails with Gmail query syntax, and send messages — all through natural language.

**Reading** — List recent inbox emails, search with powerful Gmail queries (from:, subject:, has:attachment, etc.), read full email threads with decoded content.

**Sending** — Compose and send emails, reply to existing threads. Supports plain text messages.

Authentication uses Google OAuth. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keyring.

auth.instructions: This package uses Google OAuth to access your Gmail account. You'll authorize Chitty Workspace to read and send emails on your behalf.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.help_text: Python libraries needed for Gmail API and secure credential storage.

setup_steps.label: Connect to Google account
setup_steps.help_text: Click 'Connect' to authorize Chitty Workspace to access your Gmail. A browser window will open for Google OAuth authorization.

feature_flags.label: Allow sending emails
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can compose and send emails from your Gmail account.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to send emails from your Google account.

agent_config.default_instructions: You have access to Gmail tools. Always show email content to the user before sending. Never send an email without explicit user confirmation. When reading emails, summarize long threads rather than dumping full content.
suggested_prompts: Send an email to team@company.com about the project update
Read the full email thread about the budget proposal
capabilities: Search emails with Gmail query syntax
Read full email content and threads
